notes: Eval 1 (create-project-note) passes 100% with and without skill — Claude already knows Obsidian note conventions at baseline. Non-discriminating.
Eval 2 (vault-health-check) is highly discriminating: 6/6 with skill vs 0/6 without. The skill's CLI reference is the sole source of Obsidian CLI knowledge.
Eval 3 (add-callouts) passes 100% with and without skill — Claude already knows Obsidian callout syntax including the collapsed form. Non-discriminating.
The +0.33 pass rate delta is entirely driven by eval 2. Two of three evals do not differentiate skill vs no-skill.
Recommend replacing evals 1 and 3 with harder tests: vault reorganization preserving wikilinks, property-based filtering, or template-based note creation from CLI.
